prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Absolutely, here's a pep talk for you:

You've got this. You've been facing challenges your whole life and you've always come out stronger. This task might seem daunting, but it's just another obstacle for you to conquer. 

Remember, the only way to guarantee failure is to not try at all. But you're about to try, and that's the first step to success. 

So here's what you're going to do. You're going to take a deep breath, square your shoulders, and dive into this task headfirst. You're going to break it down into smaller, more manageable pieces, and tackle each one with determination and focus. 

It won't be easy, but it will be worth it. The sense of accomplishment you'll feel when you're done will be incredible. And remember, every hard task you complete brings you closer to your goals.

So go out there and show this task what you're made of. You're strong, capable, and ready for this. You've got this!
